examples.title: Basic alert dialog
examples.description: A sticky acknowledgement dialog that cannot be dismissed by Escape.
examples.code:
<script lang="ts">
  import { AlertDialog, Button } from 'cinder';

  let open = $state(false);
</script>

<Button onclick={() => (open = true)}>Open alert dialog</Button>

<AlertDialog
  bind:open
  title="Session requires attention"
  description="Review this message before continuing. Escape and backdrop clicks intentionally keep the dialog open."
  acknowledgeLabel="I understand"
  onacknowledge={() => {}}
/>

examples.title: Destructive alert dialog
examples.description: A high-risk alert dialog with an optional cancel action.
examples.code:
<script lang="ts">
  import { AlertDialog, Button } from 'cinder';

  let open = $state(false);
</script>

<Button variant="danger" onclick={() => (open = true)}>Delete workspace</Button>

<AlertDialog
  bind:open
  title="Delete workspace"
  description="This action removes shared project data for every collaborator."
  acknowledgeLabel="Delete workspace"
  cancelLabel="Cancel"
  destructive
  onacknowledge={() => {}}
  oncancel={() => {}}
/>
